title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.340 - Transcript of judgment — revived and enforced, how
text:
534.340.  Transcript of judgment — revived and enforced, how. — Such judgment may be filed, transcripted and shall have like effect as other judgments and may be revived and enforced in the same manner.
(RSMo 1939 § 2862, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2476; 1919 § 3024; 1909 § 7686 
Effective 1-02-79
